task: Fold the tissue paper in half
raw:
The scene shows a robotic arm positioned over a green, textured surface, likely a cutting board, with a white wall and cabinets in the background. The task is to fold a tissue paper in half. Since the tissue paper is not visible in the image, it is assumed to be on the green surface. The plan involves reaching for the tissue paper, grasping it, folding it in half, and placing it back on the surface.

Goal: folded(tissue_paper); on(tissue_paper, green_surface)
Scene: green_surface, tissue_paper
Step 1: reach(green_surface)
  affordance_region: the green surface
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_surface, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_surface) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(tissue_paper)
  affordance_region: the body of the tissue_paper
  contact: holding(tissue_paper) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(tissue_paper)
Step 3: transport(tissue_paper -> green_surface)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the green_surface
  spatial: above(tissue_paper, green_surface, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(tissue_paper)
  done_when: above(tissue_paper, green_surface, 0.05)
Step 4: fold(tissue_paper)
  affordance_region: the body of the tissue_paper
  contact: folded(tissue_paper) [completion]
  direction: fold_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: folded(tissue_paper)
Step 5: place(tissue_paper -> green_surface)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the green_surface
  contact: surface_contact(tissue_paper, green_surface) [completion]; released(tissue_paper) [completion]
  pose: stable(tissue_paper) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(tissue_paper, green_surface) AND released(tissue_paper)
<END_OF_PLAN>
